title: Optimization-based decoding of Imaging Spatial Transcriptomics data.
author: Bryan JP Binan L McCann C Eldar YC Farhi SL Cleary B
content:
S-EPMC10287917 PMC10287917 Optimization-based decoding of Imaging Spatial Transcriptomics data.

Motivation

Imaging Spatial Transcriptomics techniques characterize gene expression in cells in their native context by imaging barcoded probes for mRNA with single molecule resolution. However
